message:
🌱 Add knative-eventing: storage-version-migration job never completes on istio mission (#1492)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "knative-eventing-3532-storage-version-migration-job-never-completes-on-istio-ena",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "knative-eventing: storage-version-migration job never completes on istio enabled cluster",
+    "description": "storage-version-migration job never completes on istio enabled cluster. This issue affects 6+ users.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify knative-eventing upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your knative-eventing deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing -n knative-eventing --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review knative-eventing configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant knative-eventing configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing\nkubectl get configmap -n knative-eventing -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=knative-eventing\n```\n## What version of Knative?\n0.15.2\n\n \n\n## Expected Behavior\n\n \n\nstorage-version-migration job to finish on istio enabled cluster\n\n \n\n## Actual Behavior\n\n \n\nstorage-version-migration job never completes on istio enabled cluster\n\n \n\n## Steps to"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for storage-version-migration job never completes on istio…",
+        "description": "* Fixing issue where jobs do not complete on istio enabled cluster\n\n \n\n**Release Note**\n```yaml\nmetadata:\n      annotations:\n        sidecar.istio.io/inject: \"false\"\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm storage-version-migration job never completes on… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=knative-eventing -n knative-eventing --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n knative-eventing --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "* Fixing issue where jobs do not complete on istio enabled cluster\n\n \n\n**Release Note**",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "metadata:\n      annotations:\n        sidecar.istio.io/inject: \"false\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "knative-eventing",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "knative-eventing"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/knative/eventing/issues/3532",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/knative/eventing",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/knative/eventing/pull/3534"
+    },
+    "reactions": 6,
+    "comments": 3,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with knative-eventing installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-19T06:26:52.921Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
